Slugger horizontal hydraulic bar and billet shears.
Contact Us for a Quote
SLUGGER
Horizontal Hydraulic Bar Shears
Slugger brand hydraulic bar and billet shears have been strong, reliable systems for over 40 years. Their unique engineering design with a compact footprint and horizontal shearing force, continues to make them a popular choice for many high-productivity applications.

about.text:
Slugger horizontal hydraulic bar shears and steel handling systems.
SLUGGER
Hydraulic Bar Shears
New 300 Ton Horizontal Bar Shear and Bar Unscrambler
1000 Ton AES Bar Shear System
SLUGGER
Hydraulic Bar Shears
Slugger was founded in the early 1970s as the result of innovative engineering to design a powerful hydraulic bar and billet shear with horizontal actuation. The Slugger design provided a smaller, quieter, safer and more accurate bar shear than any other it its class.
The Slugger corporation was acquired by Bemcor, Inc. in the early-80's and the product line grew to include 11 models from 40 tons to 1600 tons with the capacity to shear bar stock up to 7 ¾" diameter. Today, Slugger is a division of Advanced Equipment Systems, LLC, with complete manufacturing, service and rebuild capabilities in-house.
Advanced Equipment Systems
specializes in the manufacture of hydraulic bar shears and custom material handling solutions for the metals and metals fabrication markets. AES offers on-site installation and service and stock a wide range of replacement parts. AES steel bar, billet, tube and rod material handling systems include:
Hydraulic Bar Shears from 70 to 1700 Tons
Custom Designed Material Handling Systems
Bar Unscramblers
Bundle Accumulators
Bundle Storage Tables
Conveyors
Drag Chain Tables
Bar & Parts Loaders
Coating Lines
The Slugger name originated with company founder, J. Daniel Lazar, after his professional baseball career. Lazar was a pitcher for the Chicago White Sox in 1968 – 1969 and is a member of the Indiana State University Hall of Fame.
